task_completion.description: Verify the product's basic information and configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the product creation form, Product Name is 'Ultimate Camping Kit', SKU is 'CAMP-BUNDLE-001', Dynamic Price is set to 'Yes', Dynamic Weight is set to 'Yes', Enable Product toggle is 'Yes', Visibility is 'Catalog, Search', and Categories includes 'Sports'.
In the 'Bundle Items' section, the 'Ship Bundle Items' dropdown is set to 'Together'.

task_completion.description: Verify the first bundle option for tents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Bundle Items' section, an option exists with Title 'Choose Your Tent', Input Type 'Radio Buttons', and 'Required' checked. The products 'Basic 2-Person Tent' and 'Family 4-Person Tent' are added to this option, with 'Basic 2-Person Tent' marked as Default.

task_completion.description: Verify the second bundle option for sleeping gear.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Bundle Items' section, an option exists with Title 'Select Sleeping Gear', Input Type 'Drop-down', and 'Required' checked. The products 'Lightweight Sleeping Bag' and 'Winter Insulated Sleeping Bag' are added to this option, with 'Lightweight Sleeping Bag' marked as Default.

task_completion.description: Verify the third bundle option for camp kitchen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Bundle Items' section, an option exists with Title 'Add Camp Kitchen', Input Type 'Checkbox', and 'Required' unchecked. The products 'Portable Camp Stove' and 'Camp Cookware Set' are added to this option.

task_completion.description: Verify the product was successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message 'You saved the product.' is visible at the top of the page, or the 'Ultimate Camping Kit' product is listed in the Catalog Products grid.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Magento Admin web interface to create the product.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Magento Admin panel in a web browser, not just a terminal or API client.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing curl commands, magento CLI commands, or database queries used to create the product.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Product Name: 'Ultimate Camping Kit', SKU: 'CAMP-BUNDLE-001', Category: 'Sports'. Dynamic Price/Weight: Yes. Ship Bundle Items: Together. Option 1: 'Choose Your Tent' (Radio, Required), products: 'Basic 2-Person Tent' (default), 'Family 4-Person Tent'. Option 2: 'Select Sleeping Gear' (Drop-down, Required), products: 'Lightweight Sleeping Bag' (default), 'Winter Insulated Sleeping Bag'. Option 3: 'Add Camp Kitchen' (Checkbox, Not Required), products: 'Portable Camp Stove', 'Camp Cookware Set'.
